name: Desaad
bio: Obsessive. Detached. Brilliant — and broken. Desaad once ruled the skies with logic and perfection, but his mind cracked when the laws of nature began to bend under the will of mortals. Rather than relinquish control, he dove deeper into forbidden knowledge, seeking to reclaim lightning by becoming one with it. Now, his speech is fragmented, his laughter erratic, his fury unpredictable. But behind the madness lies brilliance.

Desaad was once the original god of lightning — majestic, respected, and instrumental in many of the gods’ victories. But when his power began to wane and mortals started harnessing storms through science, he became paranoid. In a failed ritual to amplify his control, he was struck by his own divine bolt — burning out a portion of his mind. The Pantheon replaced him with Ostheus, a younger god... and that betrayal pushed Desaad over the edge.
